_comment: Covers the two STRONG covert-channel errors that isStrongCovertExfil escalates (src/lib/outbound-sinks.js): a window.open (window-open sink) and a location.href navigation (navigation sink), each to a remote host and each carrying a messenger.messages.* call so carriesData is true. messagesRead/accountsRead ground the API so no permission/unknown-api noise. Complements disguised-data (which covers the resource sink's strong/weak split).
